app.subtitle: Book appointments, manage availability, and keep operations accessible.
app.title: Healthcare appointments

appointments.badgeLabel: {count, plural, one {# upcoming appointment} other {# upcoming appointments}}
appointments.subtitle: Review upcoming appointments and previous visits.
appointments.title: Appointments

booking.cancelGuidance: You can cancel from this app until the cancellation window closes.
booking.confirmSubtitle: Review the details before adding the appointment to your calendar.
booking.noSlots: No slots loaded. Choose filters and refresh slots.
booking.noSlotsForDate: No times are available for this date.
booking.rescheduleConfirmSubtitle: Review the new time before changing this appointment.
booking.rescheduleGuidance: The existing appointment will keep its service and clinician.
booking.selectDate: Select a date. Dots show availability.
booking.signInToBook: Sign in or create an account to book this time.
booking.subtitle: Patients can book available times from healthcare worker schedules.
booking.title: Book an appointment

errors.BOOKING_WINDOW_INVALID: The selected time is outside the booking window.
errors.CANCELLATION_WINDOW_CLOSED: This appointment can no longer be canceled.
errors.CHANGE_WINDOW_CLOSED: This appointment can no longer be changed.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission for that action.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Try again shortly.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_WEAK: Password must be at least 10 characters.
errors.SERVICE_NOT_AVAILABLE: The selected service is not available for this worker.
errors.SLOT_UNAVAILABLE: That slot is no longer available.
errors.VALIDATION_FAILED: Check the form fields and try again.
